title: Add ask gold-query evaluation
goal: Measure whether ask context packs find expected evidence before promoting ask defaults.

acceptance.assertion: Gold queries specify expected paths, ranges or citations for representative repo questions.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Evaluation reports citation coverage, required reading coverage, recall/MRR and miss taxonomy.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Default promotion requires no central query regression and a documented measurement advantage.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Evaluation explicitly does not prove answer correctness, review completeness or repository understanding.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.created_from_plan: RepoBrief Frontdoor and Grounding Verifier v1
metadata.unblocked_by: RBGV-V1-T005 verified via Lenskit PR #935; RBV1-T017 already verified.
metadata.outcome: Implemented by Lenskit PR #936: repobrief ask-eval gold-query evaluator with metrics, miss taxonomy and conservative promotion gate.

verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t006-goldset: docs/retrieval/repobrief_ask_goldset.v1.example.json and test_repobrief_ask_eval.py define expected paths/citation IDs.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t006-metrics: repobrief_ask_eval.py reports citation_coverage, required_reading_coverage, expected_path_recall, mrr_at_k and miss_taxonomy; tests cover report shape.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t006-promotion-gate: promotion_gate requires no regression and positive measurement advantage against baseline; test_evaluate_ask_goldset_promotion_gate_with_baseline_advantage.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t006-nonclaims: report does_not_establish includes no retrieval_quality_sufficient/default_promotion_safe and proof/self-review state no answer correctness or repo understanding.

checks: Lenskit PR #936 CI all green before merge
